hero.title: Integrated Logistics Solutions for More Efficient Operations
hero.desc: From export to domestic distribution, we help your company move faster with a structured, transparent and reliable logistics system.

origin.label: The Origin Story
origin.paragraph_start: Founded in 2020 in Jakarta, PT Hakka Hydro Tirta rapidly grew from a startup into a trusted logistics partner for national and international companies, with an operational network across major cities including
origin.paragraph_end: and a commitment to delivering efficient, measurable logistics solutions that keep our clients' business flowing without disruption.

items.title: Successful Shipments
items.description: Handled hundreds of intercity and inter-island shipments with structured processes and minimal issues.

items.title: Corporate Clients
items.description: Trusted by companies across manufacturing, FMCG, and technology sectors for their logistics needs.

items.title: Operational Cities
items.description: Operational networks spread across strategic cities to ensure faster and more efficient distribution.

service_label.title: Our Core Services
service_label.subtitle: Our core services to support your business logistics needs.
service_label.wa_template: Hello, I'm interested in the {title} service. Could you provide more details?

items.title: Nationwide Coverage
items.desc: Our operational network spans across strategic cities in Indonesia, enabling faster deliveries and optimized distribution control.

items.title: End-to-End Logistics Solutions
items.desc: We handle the entire process from planning to execution, so clients don’t need to coordinate with multiple vendors.

items.title: Experienced & Reliable Team
items.desc: Our professional team has hands-on experience across various industries, ensuring consistent operational standards for every project.

items.title: Time & Cost Efficiency Focus
items.desc: We optimize logistics costs without compromising delivery speed and shipment security.

testimonials.name: Budi Santoso
testimonials.text: Tim Hakka Hydro Tirta sangat responsif dan memahami kebutuhan operasional kami. Pengiriman jadi jauh lebih terstruktur.

testimonials.name: Sarah Wijaya
testimonials.text: Sistem mereka rapi dan transparan, koordinasi jadi lebih mudah bahkan untuk distribusi antar pulau.

testimonials.name: Rina Setiawan
testimonials.text: Kami sangat terbantu dengan solusi end-to-end mereka, dari perencanaan hingga eksekusi semua ditangani dengan baik.

cta_bottom.title: Need a reliable long-term logistics partner?
cta_bottom.desc: Contact our team today and start optimizing your business distribution.
